KEINEMOD-TIME_SHIFT_POWER.description: At Time Shift 12 or more, lose 12 and gain 1 Full Moon.
KEINEMOD-TIME_SHIFT_POWER.smartDescripti: At Time Shift 12 or more, lose 12 and gain 1 Full Moon.
KEINEMOD-TIME_SHIFT_POWER.title: Time Shift
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_POWER.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Knowledge[/gold], draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn.
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGE_POWER.title: Knowledge
KEINEMOD-HISTORICAL_GAP_POWER.descriptio: Whenever a card is [gold]Consumed[/gold] or [gold]Exhausted[/gold], lose X HP and lower this by [blue]1[/blue].
KEINEMOD-HISTORICAL_GAP_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever a card is [gold]Consumed[/gold] or [gold]Exhausted[/gold], lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and lower this by [blue]1[/blue].
KEINEMOD-HISTORICAL_GAP_POWER.title: Historical Gap
KEINEMOD-VALOR_POWER.title: Valor
KEINEMOD-BENEVOLENCE_POWER.title: Benevolence
KEINEMOD-WISDOM_POWER.description: Increase maximum number of cards you can [gold]Recall[/gold] when entering [green]Hakutaku[/green] form.
KEINEMOD-WISDOM_POWER.title: Wisdom
KEINEMOD-OMEGA_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-OMEGA_POWER.title: Omega
KEINEMOD-MIRRORED_POWER.smartDescription: Your next {Amount:plural:card is|[blue]{}[/blue] cards are} played an extra time this turn.
KEINEMOD-MIRRORED_POWER.title: Mirrored
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM_POWER.smartDescriptio: Your cards' [blue]Human[/blue] and [green]Hakutaku[/green] effects are considered triggered simultaneously at ALL time.
KEINEMOD-DUAL_FORM_POWER.title: Dual Form
KEINEMOD-CONCEAL_HISTORY_POWER.smartDesc: The owner's [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] is not lowered {Amount:plural:this turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
KEINEMOD-CONCEAL_HISTORY_POWER.title: Conceal History
KEINEMOD-FATIGUE_POWER.smartDescription: {Amount:plural:Next turn|For the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}, draw [blue][/blue]1 less card.
KEINEMOD-FATIGUE_POWER.title: Fatigue
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_UNTRODDEN_POWER.smar: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY_POWER.smartD: Whenever you generate a card, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Historical Gap[/gold] to a random enemies.
KEINEMOD-HISTORY_OF_FANTASY_POWER.title: History of Fantasy
